title: Three Rings University of Social Sciences
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Three Rings University of Social Sciences''' was an institution where the [[sentientologist]] [[Obo Rin]] claimed to have studied under the renowned [[Ditwar Logas]]. According to [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence's]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Herrit]], Three Rings was a compu-order diploma house rather than a genuinely accredited institution of higher learning.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-XX-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''
